### [1] [An implicitization-based solution to the minimal 4s/6r ToA problem using Cayley--Menger determinants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20840)
*Evgeniy Martyushev*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于4发射器/6接收器（4s/6r）到达时间（ToA）自定位的高效代数求解器，精度和速度均显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决通过两两距离测量来确定所有发射器和接收器相对位置的4s/6r ToA自定位问题。

Method: 结合Cayley-Menger行列式与隐式化技术，构建148x211的Macaulay矩阵，利用PLU分解和广义特征值分解进行求解并验证。

Result: 数值精度比现有方法提高约三个数量级，运行速度快1.3倍，且在真实声学数据实验中能为光束法平差提供可靠的初始估计。

Conclusion: 该求解器在计算精度和效率上具有显著优势，是解决ToA自定位问题的一种高效且实用的代数方法。

Abstract: The paper introduces an efficient algebraic solver for the 4-sender/6-receiver (4s/6r) Time-of-Arrival (ToA) self-localization problem, which involves determining the relative positions of all receivers and senders given their pairwise distance measurements. The problem is addressed through a new parametrization combining Cayley--Menger determinants with an implicitization technique. The proposed algorithm proceeds in three steps. First, a 148 x 211 Macaulay matrix is constructed from the coefficients of the original polynomial system. Second, PLU decomposition of this matrix yields a 63 x 63 matrix pair. Finally, up to 38 real solutions are obtained via generalized eigendecomposition followed by a validation step. Experiments on synthetic noise-free data demonstrate that the proposed solver outperforms existing methods by approximately three orders of magnitude in numerical accuracy while achieving an average runtime of 1.3x faster than the fastest alternative. Experiments on a real-world acoustic dataset confirm that, when integrated within a RANSAC framework, the solver provides a reliable initial guess for bundle adjustment refinement.

</details>


### [2] [LK Jam: System Architecture and Implementation of a Real-Time Human-AI Interactive Music Generation System using Role-Aware GRU](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21018)
*Yakun Liu,Zhiyu Jin,Dong Liu,Hai Luan*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文介绍了 LK_Jam，一个基于轻量级 GRU 和高性能音频宿主架构的实时双向人机交互音乐生成系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在解决现场音乐交互中离线、单向生成的局限性，实现低延迟、动态的实时双向人机协同。

Method: 算法上构建了多维稀疏事件流以捕获微观时值，工程上使用 C++、JUCE 框架和 RTNeural 推理引擎，采用零分配机制与无锁通信桥。

Result: 成功将自回归解码的端到端开销锁定在 O(1) 复杂度，有效防止音频掉包，并通过三阶段渐进式训练提升了交互水平。

Conclusion: 该系统在保证音乐连贯性与交互性的同时，克服了极端的实时工程限制，为下一代现场音乐 AI 协同演奏提供了鲁棒且易于部署的技术范式。

Abstract: As artificial intelligence advances into the era of Embodied AI, live musical interaction urgently needs to break free from the limitations of offline, unidirectional generation, achieving a "virtual synergy" capable of low-latency, dynamic interplay. To address this, this technical report presents LK_Jam, a real-time, bidirectional human-computer interactive music generation system based on a lightweight Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) and a high-performance audio host architecture. In the algorithmic representation layer, this system abandons the computationally expensive fixed time-grid. Instead, it constructs a multi-dimensional sparse event stream integrating time-shifts, continuous harmonic embeddings, and role-aware encoding, enabling the model to accurately capture turn-taking logic and micro-timing in a single-step inference. In the engineering implementation layer, this paper builds a strict multithreaded lock-free communication bridge using C++ and the JUCE framework, incorporating the RTNeural inference engine designed specifically for real-time audio. By utilizing compile-time network topology solidification and a zero-allocation (allocation-free) mechanism, the end-to-end overhead of autoregressive decoding is strictly locked at \(O(1)\) complexity, structurally mitigating the risk of audio thread dropouts in DAW plugin environments. Furthermore, this study designs a three-stage progressive training strategy, achieving a leap from basic chord harmonization to expert-level interaction. Preliminary observations and architectural analysis demonstrate that while ensuring musical coherence and interactive role-play, the proposed system successfully challenges extreme real-time engineering constraints, offering a highly robust and deployable technical paradigm for next-generation AI co-performers in live music.

</details>


### [3] [Backdoor Attacks on Speech Emotion Recognition via TTS-Generated Poisoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21052)
*Yongbin Huang,Xihao Xie,Jia Zhang*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文首次系统地研究了针对语音情感识别（SER）系统的投毒后门攻击，揭示了利用TTS技术生成隐蔽触发器对该系统的严重威胁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管自监督声学表征在SER中应用广泛，但其在训练阶段面临的投毒后门攻击威胁尚未得到充分探索。

Method: 引入了一种低能量且隐蔽的声学触发器，可植入自然或TTS合成的语音中，并以此对SER系统进行系统性的后门攻击测试。

Result: 实验表明，在低投毒率下攻击即可达到高成功率且不影响正常样本表现，同时该后门表现出强跨模型迁移性，自监督表征对此类触发器高度敏感。

Conclusion: TTS技术降低了后门攻击的门槛，暴露了现代SER系统的严重安全漏洞，突显了开发专门防御机制的紧迫性。

Abstract: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) systems increasingly leverage self-supervised acoustic representations, yet their vulnerability to training-time attacks remains largely underexplored. This paper presents the first systematic study of poisoning-based backdoor attacks on SER, with a focus on threats enabled by text-to-speech (TTS) generated audio. We introduce a stealthy, low-energy acoustic trigger that can be embedded imperceptibly into both natural and synthetic speech, enabling scalable and consistent poisoning. Our experiments demonstrate that SER models can be reliably compromised with high attack success rates under low poisoning ratios, while maintaining near-clean performance on benign inputs. We further show that backdoor patterns exhibit strong cross-model transferability and that self-supervised representations are particularly susceptible to learning these triggers. These findings reveal that TTS technology dramatically lowers the barrier to effective backdoor attacks, exposing critical vulnerabilities in modern SER pipelines and motivating the urgent need for dedicated defenses.

</details>


### [4] [Imitation Learning for Elder-Facing Speech Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21053)
*Dongrui Han,Weidong Chen,Jiawen Kang,Mingyu Cui,Helen Meng,Xixin Wu*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于模仿学习的TTS框架，旨在为听力理解力下降的老年人生成更易懂的语音，避免了高成本的偏好数据收集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的TTS系统忽略了老年人的听觉与认知退化需求，而直接收集老年人的偏好反馈数据成本高昂且容易使其疲劳。

Method: 提出一种模仿学习框架，通过两阶段在线策略奖励学习（OPRL）改进群组相对策略优化（GRPO），以缓解在有限专家演示监督下的奖励作弊问题。

Result: 实验结果表明，结合OPRL的GRPO方法在客观和主观评估指标上均优于原GRPO及有监督基线模型。

Conclusion: 该方法通过模仿专家演示和优化奖励机制，成功提升了面向老年人的TTS语音生成质量与可理解性。

Abstract: Recent advances in text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis have achieved highly natural and expressive speech generation. However, these systems are designed for general adults and overlook older adults' speech comprehension needs due to age-related sensory and cognitive decline. Prior work involves older adults by collecting preference feedback to tune model parameters. However, obtaining sufficient preference data is costly and difficult, as older adults quickly become fatigued during collection. In this paper, we propose a novel imitation learning (IL) framework to learn TTS models from expert demonstrations. We further improve Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with two-stage on-policy reward learning (OPRL) to mitigate reward hacking under limited supervision from expert demonstration. Experimental results show that GRPO w/ OPRL outperforms GRPO and supervised baselines in objective and subjective metrics. Audio samples are available at https://dongru1.github.io/demo/im-efss

</details>


### [5] [A Generalized Formalism of Auto-Regressive Decoding for Speech Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20714)
*Julia Gachot,Philipp Allgeuer,Marie S. Bauer,Stefan Wermter*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个用于语音处理中自回归（AR）搜索策略的通用理论框架，以规范和简化解码策略的评估与比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音领域缺乏对自回归搜索策略的统一和全面概述，导致策略的选择、比较和评估存在困难与不一致。

Method: 设定了自回归搜索的明确准入标准，并推导出一个通用的理论框架来对神经模型的搜索策略进行分类和描述。

Result: 该框架成功简化了以解码过程为中心的基准测试设计，并实现了专注于搜索策略的消融研究。

Conclusion: 该通用理论框架为语音处理中的自回归搜索策略提供了系统化的分类和评估方法。

Abstract: In speech processing, most state-of-the-art sequence prediction models rely on auto-regressive (AR) strategies to generate output sequences based on the raw predictions of the model. Despite their crucial role in the inference process, a comprehensive overview of AR strategies as a unified field is lacking, due largely to implicit and multiple definitions of next-token decoding. This context complicates the choice, comparison, and evaluation of strategies, while creating inconsistencies in the characterization of approaches as auto-regressive or not. We begin by setting explicit inclusion criteria for the field of AR search in speech processing, and derive a generalized theoretical framework to categorize and report on search strategies for neural models. We show the capabilities of this formalism in simplifying the design of benchmarks centered around the decoding process, allowing for ablation studies that are focused on search strategies.

</details>


### [6] [Exploiting Neural Audio Codec Latents for Adversarial Audio Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20893)
*Sameek Bhattacharya,Bharath Krishnamurthy,Ajita Rattani*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在神经音频编解码器连续潜空间中进行生成式对抗攻击的框架，以实现超低延迟的实时音频对抗样本生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的对抗攻击方法在波形域迭代优化时计算成本高，而现有的生成式或扩散式方法推理延迟高，无法满足实时威胁评估的需求。

Method: 提出一种基于神经音频编解码器连续潜空间的攻击框架，使用条件生成器在单次前向传播中合成特定类别的扰动，并将其解码为对抗性音频波形。

Result: 该方法实现了高达99%的有靶向攻击成功率，推理时间低于7毫秒，比现有生成式基线方法的延迟降低了24倍。

Conclusion: 该框架在保持极高攻击成功率的同时显著降低了延迟，为评估音频分类系统的实时脆弱性提供了一种高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Deep learning-based audio classification systems, including automatic speaker verification, are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Realistic real-time threat assessment remains difficult because optimization-based methods, such as projected gradient descent (PGD) and Carlini-Wagner, require costly iterative updates in the high-dimensional waveform domain. Generative attacks allow single-shot synthesis but often introduce perceptible artifacts or depend on computationally intensive architectures, while diffusion and autoregressive approaches incur high inference latency. To address this gap, we propose a generative attack framework operating in the continuous latent space of a neural audio codec. A conditional generator synthesizes class-specific perturbations in a single forward pass and decodes them into adversarial waveforms. Our method achieves targeted attack success rates up to 99% with sub-7 ms inference, outperforming generative baselines while reducing latency by 24x.

</details>


### [7] [AOR-Bench: Do Large Audio Language Models Over-Refuse Pseudo-Harmful Queries?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21147)
*Jiaxi Yang,Chaewan Chun,Jason Lucas,Yuchen Yang,Dongwon Lee*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文引入了首个针对大型语音语言模型过度拒答问题的基准测试AOR-Bench。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 防止语音语言模型生成有害回复的拒绝机制常导致误拒良性请求（过度拒答），尤其是在音频上下文影响语义判断时。

Method: 创建了包含3000个音频样本的AOR-Bench，评估了12个代表性模型，并测试了思维链和激活引导两种缓解方法。

Result: 发现过度拒答在现有模型中普遍存在，并证实了所提出的轻量级缓解策略能有效减少过度拒答。

Conclusion: 过度拒答是语音模型安全对齐中的关键问题，本研究为其评估和优化提供了基础工具与方法。

Abstract: Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of audio tasks. As they are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, ensuring their safety alignment has become more important. Although refusal mechanisms serve as a key safeguard by preventing LALMs from responding to harmful requests, they can also lead to {\em over-refusal}, where models incorrectly reject benign queries. This issue is especially challenging in the audio domain because speech that appears harmful in isolation may become benign when interpreted together with the surrounding acoustic context, such as background sounds. To study this problem, we introduce \textbf{AOR-Bench} (\textbf{A}udio \textbf{O}ver-\textbf{R}efusal \textbf{Bench}mark), the first benchmark for over-refusal specifically designed for LALMs. AOR-Bench contains 3,000 pseudo-harmful audio samples across six scenario categories. Evaluating 12 representative LALMs from six major model families, we find that over-refusal is widespread (Figure~\ref{fig:overall_performance}) and uncover several important patterns in their safety judgments. As a preliminary effort to mitigate this issue, we further explore two lightweight strategies (e.g., Chain-of-Thought and activation steering) to reduce over-refusal.

</details>


### [8] [SDP-Codec: A Speaker-Decoupled Speech Codec with Pitch Injection for Low-Bitrate Coding and Zero-Shot Voice Conversion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21157)
*Hounsu Kim,Juhan Nam*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: SDP-Codec 是一种单阶段训练的说话人解耦语音编解码器，能在极低说话人信息泄露下实现高质量重构与零样本声音转换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有解耦编解码器面临权衡：显式抑制说话人泄露的方法依赖复杂的多阶段训练，而简单设计则容易在本地 token 中残留说话人信息。

Method: 提出 SDP-Codec，采用单阶段优化管线。通过预训练自监督编码器提取本地 token，并利用带有全局条件去归一化和软标签重建目标的音高编解码器注入归一化 F0。

Result: 在 16 kHz 和 24 kHz 设置下实现了极具竞争力的重构和零样本声音转换，且说话人探测准确率最低，显著减少了说话人信息泄露。

Conclusion: 该研究表明，通过单阶段优化和合理的 pitch 注入设计，可以有效解决说话人泄露问题并保持高质量的语音合成与转换性能。

Abstract: Speaker-decoupled speech codecs can reduce bitrate by separating global speaker attributes from local content and prosody, while supporting voice conversion. Existing speaker-decoupled codecs face a trade-off: methods that explicitly suppress speaker leakage often rely on multi-stage or auxiliary training, whereas simpler designs can leave residual speaker information in local tokens. We propose SDP-Codec, a speaker-decoupled, pitch-injected codec trained with a single-stage optimization pipeline. SDP-Codec derives local tokens from continuous pre-quantization features of a pretrained self-supervised encoder and injects normalized F0 via a pitch encoder-decoder with global-conditioned denormalization and soft-label pitch reconstruction objective. Across 16 kHz and 24 kHz settings, SDP-Codec achieves competitive reconstruction and strong zero-shot voice conversion at comparable bitrates, with the lowest speaker-probing accuracy among compared systems, suggesting reduced speaker leakage.

</details>


### [9] [Bagpiper-Edit: Zero-Shot Open-Ended Audio Editing via Rich-Caption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21227)
*Xun Gong,Jinchuan Tian,Haoran Wang,William Chen,Shinji Watanabe,Yanmin Qian*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: Bagpiper-Edit 是一种无需成对训练数据的开放式音频编辑方法，通过将音频编辑重塑为富文本重写任务来实现零样本编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的文本指导音频编辑方法高度依赖成对训练数据、预定义的操作模板，且在语音、音乐和声音等不同领域间缺乏统一的处理流水线。

Method: 将音频编辑定义为富文本标题重写任务。首先将用户编辑请求转化为修改后的文本标题，然后以原音频为声学上下文锚点，引导模型生成目标编辑音频。

Result: 在语音、通用音频和自由格式编辑的评估中，Bagpiper-Edit 保持了与原始音频的高度一致性，且在多数情况下达到了与专门领域专家模型相媲美的性能。

Conclusion: 该研究成功实现了免成对训练数据的零样本音频编辑，为统一且自由的自然语言音频编辑提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Current text-guided audio editing methods rely on paired training data, predefined operation templates, and separate processing pipelines across speech, music, and sound. We present Bagpiper-Edit to enable open-ended audio editing via free-form natural language instructions. We reformulate audio editing as a rich-caption rewriting task by treating a rich caption as the semantic representation of an audio clip. The user request is translated into an edited caption, which then guides Bagpiper-Edit to generate the target edited audio with the original audio as contextual acoustic anchor. This unlocks the potential of free-form editing, and circumvents the need for paired audio-editing training data, enabling powerful zero-shot editing capabilities. Evaluations across speech, audio, and free-form editing show Bagpiper-Edit maintains good consistency to the original audio and achieves similar performance to other expert models in most cases. Demo: https://bagpiper-edit.github.io, Codes: https://github.com/espnet/espnet/pull/6417 & https://github.com/HsunGong/espnet

</details>


### [10] [LISE : Listenable Interpretable Speaker Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21305)
*Xiaoliang Wu,Chongxin Gan,Ke Liu,Peter Bell,Jennifer Williams*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出 LISE 框架，将预训练说话人嵌入分解为可听且具可解释性的组件，同时保持自动说话人确认性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自动说话人确认系统虽然强大，但其嵌入表示是不透明的，缺乏直观、可听且经听众验证的结构化解释。

Method: 提出无标签框架 LISE，将预训练的说话人嵌入（如 x-vector 和 ECAPA-TDNN）分解为少量成分，并通过人类听力实验验证其可解释性。

Result: LISE 在几乎不影响等错误率（EER）的情况下保留了 ASV 性能，且人类听众在区分基于分解组件的说话人时达到了 83.9% 的准确率。

Conclusion: LISE 成功提供了一种结构化且具人类可解释性的说话人嵌入分解方法，平衡了系统性能与可解释性。

Abstract: Deep neural network-based automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems achieve impressive performance but their embedding representations remain opaque, lacking a structured and perceptually verifiable explanation of the vocal characteristics they encode. Existing approaches either require annotation of speaker attributes or introduce alternative representations whose interpretability is unvalidated with listeners. We propose Listenable Interpretable Speaker Embeddings (LISE), a label-free framework that decomposes pretrained speaker embeddings into a small set of components. This decomposition yields a structured representation that supports the analysis of what information has been encoded by speaker embeddings. LISE preserves ASV performance with negligible EER degradation on x-vector and ECAPA-TDNN. Crucially, the interpretability of these components for human listeners is demonstrated through listening experiments, where participants distinguished speakers with 83.9% accuracy.

</details>


### [11] [Online Predictive Coding for Dual-Mode Self-Supervised Speech Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21268)
*Keita Goto,Takashi Maekaku,Jin Sakuma,Jinchuan Tian,Yusuke Shinohara,Shinji Watanabe*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了在线预测编码（OPC）和双模层归一化，以提升双模自监督语音模型的预训练效果和优化稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双模自监督语音模型在流式和非流式条件下的上下文范围不同导致优化困难，且现有的在线寄存器方法提升有限。

Method: 引入在线预测编码（OPC）通过多步未来预测正则化寄存器，并结合双模层归一化稳定模型优化。

Result: 在LibriSpeech和WSJ的语音识别评估中，该方法显著缩小了在线与离线性能差距，在160ms延迟下，LibriSpeech test-clean的字错率由3.65%降至3.40%。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效稳定了双模自监督语音模型的优化，并显著提升了流式语音识别的性能。

Abstract: Dual-mode self-supervised speech models are pre-trained to handle streaming and non-streaming conditions simultaneously. However, their attention is computed over different context ranges, which often makes optimization difficult. In previous work, we proposed online registers, additional tokens intended to compensate for missing future context in streaming mode, but the gains remained limited. To address these issues, we introduce two improvements for robust dual-mode pre-training: (1) Online Predictive Coding (OPC), which regularizes the registers through multi-step future prediction, and (2) Dual-mode Layer Normalization, which stabilizes optimization. We fine-tune the proposed dual-mode self-supervised speech models for speech recognition on LibriSpeech and WSJ. Results show that OPC consistently reduces the online-offline performance gap; at 160 ms latency on LibriSpeech, word error rates improve from 3.65% to 3.40% on test-clean and from 10.15% to 9.65% on test-other.

</details>


### [12] [Sea-Scan: High-Accuracy, ML-based Dark Vessel Detection and Localisation via Weakly Supervised DAS Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21326)
*Tian Tian,Agastya Raj,Lara Flanagan,John Kennedy,Marco Ruffini*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出一个基于机器学习的船只检测与定位系统，利用不完美的AIS标签进行弱监督训练，能有效识别无标签数据中的暗船事件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的船只检测依赖AIS数据，但存在数据不完整或故意关闭（暗船）的问题，因此需要开发一种能利用不完美标签进行有效检测的方法。

Method: 开发了一种基于机器学习的检测与定位系统，并使用不完美的AIS标签对其进行弱监督训练。

Result: 该系统实现了97.8%的检测率，误报率仅为1.98%，并成功从无标签数据中识别出暗船（dark-vessel）事件。

Conclusion: 研究表明，利用弱监督学习和不完美AIS标签训练的系统能够高效、高精度地进行船只定位，并有效识别隐蔽的暗船活动。

Abstract: We present an ML-based vessel detection and localization system, trained with weak supervision from imperfect AIS labels, that achieves a 97.8% detection rate at 1.98% false-trigger rate, successfully identifies dark-vessel events from unlabeled data.

</details>


### [13] [Direct Raw Audio Signal Processing via Reservoir Computing: An Investigation into 'Feature-Free' Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21335)
*Rinku Sebastian,Simon O Keefe,Martin A Trefzer*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 评估储备池计算（RC）作为无特征提取音频处理框架的潜力，证明并行深层储备池架构在低复杂度下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统音频处理依赖于手工特征提取（如MFCCs），这带来了计算和预处理的瓶颈。本研究旨在通过直接分类原始声学信号来消除这些阶段。

Method: 评估并对比了浅层、顺序和并行深层储备池（RC）架构，探究其在时域音频处理中的分层特征表示能力。

Result: 实验表明，所提出的并行储备池架构在保持低模型复杂度的同时，性能持续优于浅层和顺序基线模型。

Conclusion: 储备池计算（RC）是一种高效且可扩展的时域音频处理替代方案，为开发低功耗、极少预处理要求的声学部署系统提供了可行路径。

Abstract: This paper evaluates Reservoir Computing (RC) as an autonomous, 'feature-free' framework for audio processing, designed to eliminate traditional, handcrafted feature extraction stages. We investigate whether the high-dimensional temporal dynamics inherent in a reservoir can function as a robust end-to-end processor for the direct classification of raw acoustic signals. By bypassing computationally intensive representations like MFCCs, this approach seeks to mitigate significant intellectual and pre-processing bottlenecks in traditional signal pipelines. Our study evaluates and compares shallow, sequential, and parallel deep reservoir architectures to determine their capacity for hierarchical feature representation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed parallel approach consistently outperforms shallow and sequential baselines while maintaining low model complexity. These findings highlight the potential of RC as an efficient and scalable alternative for time-domain audio processing, offering a promising pathway toward deployable, low-power acoustic systems with minimal preprocessing requirements.

</details>


### [14] [LambdaMark: Semantic Audio Watermarking for Robustness and Radioactivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21365)
*Kexin Li,Xiao Hu,Ilya Grishchenko,David Lie*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出了LambdaMark，这是首个通过将多比特水印嵌入语义音频潜表征以抵御语音克隆的通用放射性音频水印方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音克隆技术的进步带来了欺诈风险，而现有的音频水印多作用于低级物理表征，易被篡改且无法在下游模型微调中保留（缺乏放射性）。

Method: 引入LambdaMark，将水印嵌入语义音频潜表征中。使用轻量级编码器注入扰动，解码器检测和恢复信息，并通过联合多分量损失函数进行训练。

Result: LambdaMark在常见失真下具有近乎完美的鲁棒性，能抵御所有评估的去除攻击，并且其水印特征能成功放射并保留在经微调的下游模型生成结果中。

Conclusion: LambdaMark通过语义层面的水印嵌入，成功实现了兼具鲁棒性和放射性的音频保护，为防范未授权的语音生成提供了有效的技术手段。

Abstract: Recent advances in generative audio have made voice cloning increasingly effortless, enabling voice fraud, impersonation, and other forms of unauthorized use. A common attack finetunes a speech generation model on recordings of a target speaker, allowing the model to synthesize speech in that speaker's voice. Audio watermarking offers a promising defense by embedding detectable signals into audio. A practical watermark must satisfy two key properties: robustness and radioactivity. Existing audio watermarking methods typically embed signals into low-level representations, such as waveforms or spectrograms, which makes them vulnerable to signal-level manipulations and limits their transfer to downstream models. We introduce LambdaMark -- the first generic radioactive watermarking scheme. Unlike all previous approaches, LambdaMark achieves generic radioactivity by embedding multi-bit watermark information into semantic audio latent representations. Our watermarks have semantic interpretation and are thus more likely to be learned by a downstream model through finetuning. LambdaMark includes a lightweight watermark encoder to inject multi-bit message-dependent perturbations into semantic audio representations and a decoder to detect watermark presence and recover the embedded bit information. Encoder and decoder are trained using a custom multi-component loss that preserves fidelity of the watermarked audio, increases bit-level recovery rate, and improves robustness against common distortions and adversarial removal attempts. Experiments show that LambdaMark achieves near-perfect robustness under common distortions. LambdaMark is also the only watermark that is robust against all evaluated removal attacks. Furthermore, LambdaMark exhibits general and robust radioactivity and remains robust to distortions and adversarial removal attacks even on the generated outputs of those finetuned models.

</details>


### [15] [CoughPhase-CLR: Designing an acoustics-informed foundation model for coughing sound classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21411)
*Marius Moldovan,Anton Batliner,Thomas M. Berghaus,Björn W. Schuller,Andreas Triantafyllopoulos*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为CoughPhase-CLR的自监督学习框架，利用咳嗽的生理阶段进行鲁棒的特征表示学习，并在多项下游任务中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的自监督学习方法（如随机裁剪）未考虑咳嗽特有的生理阶段，且现有呼吸音模型在COPD状态分类等复杂任务上面临瓶颈。

Method: 通过在约40小时公开咳嗽音频上进行预训练，基于咳嗽的特定声学阶段构建对比学习的正样本对，并与多种最先进的模型进行基准对比。

Result: 咳嗽特定阶段的预训练方法显著优于随机裁剪。在COPD状态分类中，预训练音频模型最高达到57% UAR，但仍未达到语音分析方法84% UAR的基准水平。

Conclusion: 结合生理阶段的咳嗽自监督预训练能有效提升表征性能，但对于如COPD分类等极具挑战性的任务，仍需进一步优化模型或结合其他模态。

Abstract: In this work, we introduce CoughPhase-CLR, a self-supervised learning framework designed to leverage the physiological phases of a cough for robust representation learning. Unlike generic contrastive frameworks, CoughPhase-CLR constructs positive pairs based on these specific acoustic phases. We pre-trained our model on approximately 40 hours of public cough audio and evaluated it across five downstream tasks, including COVID-19 detection, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) state classification, and smoker status prediction. Our results demonstrate that cough-specific pre-training consistently outperforms standard random-cropping techniques when training on cough recordings. Additionally, we benchmarked a diverse set of state-of-the-art models on COPD state classification, highlighting the difficulty of this task. The best-performing models, pretrained on either general audio or respiratory sounds, achieved a UAR of 57\%, failing to outperform the state-of-the-art performance of 84\% UAR achieved using speech analysis.

</details>


### [16] [DisSpeech: Low-Resource Controllable Mandarin Stuttered Speech Synthesis for ASR Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21457)
*Yao Lu*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了DisSpeech框架，通过基于离散语音标记的可控中文口吃语音合成进行数据增强，显著提升了口吃语音识别的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于中文口吃语音数据稀缺且不流畅模式复杂，导致难以训练出针对口吃语音的鲁棒ASR模型。

Method: 引入显式口吃事件标签，利用非自回归掩码生成Transformer将文本和标签映射为语义标记，并通过显式音高和能量建模进行声学重建。

Result: 该方法在语音质量和事件控制上均优于以往方法，利用合成数据增强使Qwen3-ASR-0.6B模型在中文口吃识别任务上达到4.19%的最低字错率（CER）。

Conclusion: DisSpeech在低资源条件下实现了高质量、可控的口吃语音合成，是一种提升口吃语音识别模型性能的有效数据增强方案。

Abstract: Stuttered speech recognition remains challenging, with disfluencies such as repetitions, prolongations, and blocks disrupting speech continuity and acoustic patterns. This problem is further aggravated in Mandarin scenarios by the limited availability of stuttered speech data, which makes it difficult to train robust ASR models for diverse disfluency patterns. To address this problem, this paper proposes DisSpeech, a discrete speech token-based framework for low-resource controllable Mandarin stuttered speech synthesis and ASR data augmentation. The proposed framework introduces explicit stuttering event labels to control different disfluency patterns. Text and stuttering event labels are mapped into semantic speech tokens by a non-autoregressive masked generative Transformer, followed by prosody-aware acoustic reconstruction with explicit pitch and energy modeling. With fine-tuning using less than 50 hours of Mandarin stuttered speech, DisSpeech can generate controllable stuttered speech with competitive speech quality. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms previous stuttered speech synthesis methods in both speech quality and event controllability. Furthermore, the synthesized stuttered speech effectively improves multiple ASR models, with Qwen3-ASR-0.6B achieving a state-of-the-art CER of 4.19% on the evaluated Mandarin stuttered speech recognition task, while causing only slight degradation on fluent speech.

</details>


### [17] [Gradient-Based Learning of Parametric Engine Sound Representations for Real-Time Resynthesis and Tuning on Embedded Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21521)
*Robin Doerfler,Matthieu Kuntz,Clemens Zimmer*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络和可微DSP的发动机声音建模与合成参数推导方法，实现了高保真度重构并在嵌入式系统上成功部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统发动机阶次分析方法难以自动从音频数据中提取合成参数，且需要同时满足手动可调性与车载嵌入式框架的兼容性。

Method: 利用端到端可微的分析合成框架，结合梯度优化与机器学习，从音频中提取全转速-转矩范围内的阶次与宽带音色参数，并引入随机合成成分。

Result: 频谱指标和听音测试证实了该方法的高重构保真度，且参数可直接移植到传统DSP，在EVx Suite平台上验证了嵌入式部署的可行性。

Conclusion: 该方法成功桥接了机器学习参数推导与实时嵌入式DSP部署，为汽车主动声浪设计提供了一种高效、高保真且兼容性强的解决方案。

Abstract: Engine order enhancement is central in automotive sound design, where selective harmonics are synthesized to shape perceptual qualities such as sportiness, refinedness, or power. This paper investigates a neural network-based approach to combustion engine sound modeling that extends conventional engine order analysis and enhancement by deriving synthesis parameters from audio data with machine learning and incorporating stochastic components into the synthesis framework. The system parameterizes engine sounds as a compact representation capturing per-order and broadband timbral variation across the full RPM-torque operating range, while remaining manually tunable and compatible with established automotive audio frameworks. The approach leverages gradient-based optimization and analysis-by-synthesis through an end-to-end differentiable implementation. The resulting synthesis parameter set is directly transferable to conventional DSP implementations for deployment on embedded targets. Spectral metrics and listening tests confirm high reconstruction fidelity, and integration into an established automotive audio development platform (EVx Suite) demonstrates technical feasibility on deployment-ready embedded systems.

</details>


### [18] [When EER Hides Deployment Failure: Auditing Threshold Transfer and Unlabeled Score Calibration for Speech Deepfake Detectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21584)
*Jingwen Zhou,Mingzhe Wang*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 研究表明，以EER为单一指标评估语音深度伪造检测会掩盖实际部署中的阈值失配问题，且现有的测试时校准方法均无法有效解决该问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学术界评估语音伪造检测系统时依赖于理想的EER阈值，而实际部署中必须提前固定阈值，这导致了评估与实际部署之间的巨大差距。

Method: 利用SSL-AASIST检测器在跨数据集（In-the-Wild, ASVspoof 2021 DF）上评估阈值迁移对HTER的影响，并系统性审计了7种无监督测试时修正方法（如z-norm、AS-norm和伪标签校准）。

Result: 阈值迁移导致In-the-Wild数据集上的HTER达到39.5%（78.7%的真语音被拒）；证明了单调递增分数变换无法改变EER；AS-norm导致EER崩溃至60.2%，伪标签校准在偏置数据上退化。

Conclusion: 现有的测试时校准方法无法解决阈值漂移，建议未来评估语音伪造检测系统时，应同时汇报迁移阈值下的HTER和EER。

Abstract: Speech deepfake countermeasures (CMs) are compared almost exclusively by equal error rate (EER), a metric computed at an oracle threshold chosen on the labeled test set. Deployed CMs enjoy no such oracle: a threshold must be fixed in advance and applied to unlabeled target data. We audit this gap with a frozen state-of-the-art SSL-AASIST detector trained on ASVspoof 2019 LA. While its in-domain EER is 0.21%, transferring its LA-calibrated threshold to the In-the-Wild corpus yields a half total error rate (HTER) of 39.5%, with 78.7% of bona fide speech rejected, even though the In-the-Wild EER (11.2%) appears moderate. We then test whether popular unlabeled test-time corrections close this gap, and first prove a simple proposition: any strictly increasing score transform, including z-norm, temperature/shift calibration, and embedding mean alignment under a frozen linear head, cannot change EER. An audit of seven corrections on In-the-Wild and ASVspoof 2021 DF confirms the proposition empirically and exposes two further failure modes: AS-norm with an unlabeled target cohort collapses (EER 11.2% to 60.2%), and pseudo-label calibration that reduces HTER by 38% relative on In-the-Wild degenerates to 50% HTER on DF21, whose spoof prior is 96%. No audited correction reduces EER by more than 1% relative. We recommend reporting HTER at a transferred threshold alongside EER.

</details>


### [19] [Time-Frequency Weighted Losses for Phoneme Reconstruction in DNN-Based Speech Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21635)
*Nasser-Eddine Monir,Paul Magron,Romain Serizel*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于时频加权SDR损失的语音增强方法，以提升音素可懂度和重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SDR损失均匀对待所有时频区域，忽视了对音素可懂度关键的细粒度频谱线索。

Method: 引入结合语音存在度、信干比和频谱通量的时频加权框架，动态调制SDR目标函数。

Result: 提高了频率加权指标及音素（尤其是辅音）识别率，改善了中频结构的重构。

Conclusion: 该加权框架有效引导模型关注关键时频区域，显著提升了语音增强的实际效果与可懂度。

Abstract: Conventional training losses for speech enhancement based on the signal-to-distortion ratio (SDR) treat all time-frequency (TF) regions uniformly, overlooking the fine-grained spectral cues that are relevant to specific phoneme intelligibility. We propose a TF weighting framework that modulates the SDR objective based on local speech presence, speech-to-interference ratio (SIR), and spectral flux. By integrating these factors into a differentiable objective, the framework emphasizes TF bins with high speech-noise competition while also accounting for transient cues such as consonant bursts. Experimental results show that our approach improves objective frequency-weighted enhancement metrics, as well as phoneme recognition accuracy, particularly for consonants. Spectral analysis shows better reconstruction of mid-frequency structures at less adverse SIR.

</details>


### [20] [Streaming T5-based Text-to-Speech Synthesis with Limited Lookahead](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21882)
*Muyang Du,Jason Roche,Junjie Lai*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: S5-TTS 是一种流式语音合成模型，通过逐词增量生成显著降低了延迟，并保持了与全上下文模型相当的语音质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在级联的大语言模型与语音合成（LLM-TTS）系统中，由于大多数 TTS 模型需要完整上下文才能开始生成，导致系统存在较高的端到端延迟。

Method: 基于编码器-解码器语言建模和单调对齐学习，引入了结合卷积辅助注意力的前瞻因果掩码机制，并采用交错多源蒸馏技术来恢复语音自然度。

Result: S5-TTS 实现了与全上下文 T5-TTS 相当的语音质量，支持高说话人相似度的零样本（zero-shot）合成，并大幅降低了端到端延迟。

Conclusion: S5-TTS 有效平衡了流式语音合成中的延迟与质量问题，非常适合应用于实际的对话式人工智能系统。

Abstract: Streaming text-to-speech synthesis in cascaded LLM-TTS systems still faces latency challenges as most TTS models require full context before initiating generation. We present S5-TTS, a streaming variant of T5-TTS that enables low-latency, word-by-word incremental speech synthesis through encoder-decoder language modeling and monotonic alignment learning. S5-TTS begins generating speech immediately after receiving the first few words, substantially reducing end-to-end response latency. To maintain quality under limited lookahead, we introduce a lookahead-causal masking mechanism with Conv-based auxiliary attention that preserves intelligibility and speaker similarity, and employ interleaved multi-source distillation to further restore naturalness. Experiments show that S5-TTS achieves comparable quality to full-context T5-TTS, supports zero-shot synthesis with high speaker similarity, and significantly reduces end-to-end latency for practical conversational AI systems.

</details>


### [21] [Improving Text-to-Music Generation with Human Preference Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21670)
*Yonghyun Kim,Junwon Lee,Haiwen Xia,Yinghao Ma,Chris Donahue*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文介绍了ICME 2026学术文本生成音乐挑战赛效率赛道的参赛方案，通过在轻量级FluxAudio-S模型上结合人类偏好反馈与多阶段优化，实现了高效的音乐生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在超越传统的FAD-CLAP和CLAP指标，通过引入来自TuneJury的人类偏好奖励信号，提升文本生成音乐在效率和质量上的表现。

Method: 基于120M参数的FluxAudio-S，结合了五项核心设计：训练期奖励调节、五种分数调节架构的筛选、前10%样本的专家迭代、用于对齐的CRPO偏好微调，以及包含CFG、源分离和响度归一化的推理后处理。

Result: 实验表明，专家迭代对性能提升贡献最大，训练期奖励调节起到了有效的控制轴作用，偏好微调带来的提升极小，且推理期分数在流水线末端已趋于饱和。

Conclusion: 结合奖励调节、专家迭代和推理后处理，能够在极小的模型参数量下有效提升文本生成音乐的对齐质量与效率。

Abstract: We describe our entry to the efficiency track of the Academic Text-to-Music (ATTM) Grand Challenge at ICME 2026. Beyond the challenge protocol's FAD-CLAP and CLAP score, we add a learned human-preference reward from TuneJury, a twin pairwise ranker trained over open music-preference datasets. The reward serves both as a training-time conditioning signal and as a sample-selection criterion. The pipeline combines five engineering decisions on a 120M-parameter FluxAudio-S backbone, four at training time and one at inference: (i) training-time reward conditioning that doubles as an inference-time CFG axis, (ii) a sweep over five score-conditioning architectures, where training and inference use different variants, (iii) expert iteration on the top decile, (iv) a short preference-tuning pass (CRPO) for audio-text alignment, and (v) inference post-processing via joint CFG, source separation, and loudness normalization. Per-stage decomposition on 100 Song Describer prompts shows training-time reward conditioning as a functional conditioning axis, expert iteration as the dominant contributor, the preference-tuning pass adding only noise-level gain, and the inference-time score scalar already saturated by the end of the chain.

</details>


### [22] [Improving Engine Sound Analysis in Hot-Test Environments via a RAB-U-Net (Residual Attention Block U-Net) Noise Removal Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21887)
*Raheleh Mohseni,Mahdi Alyari*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于改进U-Net（RAB-U-Net）的深度学习方法，用于消除发动机生产线热试中的背景噪声，以提高诊断准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生产线热试中的背景噪声会干扰发动机声音分析，且传统人工评估易出错，需要一种能实时去除背景噪声的智能诊断方法。

Method: 利用结合了残差注意力模块（Residual Attention Blocks）的U-Net神经网络结构（RAB-U-Net）来消除录音中的背景噪声。

Result: 该系统显著提高了发动机噪声检测的准确性，在去噪和实时应用方面均优于传统技术。

Conclusion: 本研究提出了一种新型发动机噪声检测系统，为汽车工业利用深度学习提升发动机诊断质量提供了有价值的解决方案。

Abstract: During hot tests on a production line, engine-sound analysis is crucial to ensuring product quality and performance. However, background noise often interferes with accurate sound analysis, leading to potential errors in engine diagnostics. Traditionally, skilled technicians listen to engine sounds to assess engine health, but this is prone to significant inaccuracies. This study presents an innovative deep learning-based approach to address this issue by removing background noise from engine sound recordings using a U-Net neural network structure enhanced with Residual Attention Blocks (RAB-U-Net). Our intelligent noise removal system significantly improves the accuracy of engine noise detection, outperforming traditional techniques and providing a robust solution for real-time applications in production line environments. This study proposes a novel system for engine noise detection in production lines, marking a valuable advancement for the automotive industry in applying deep learning methods to improve the quality of engine diagnostics.

</details>


### [23] [AugCodec: A Low-Bitrate Disentangled Neural Speech Codec via Data Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21893)
*Dongmei Wang,Xiaohang Sun,Yang Liu,Fanjie Kong,Abhishek Yanamandra,Abhinav Jain,Daniel Tompkins,Woohyun Kang,Najmeh Sadoughi,Sunil Hadap,Xiang Hao,Zhu Liu,Caren Chen*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了解耦神经语音编解码器 AugCodec，通过数据增强将语音分解为语义、说话人和韵律标记，实现低码率下的高质量语音重构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在降低语音编解码器的令牌率，同时实现语音属性（语义、说话人、韵律）的有效解耦，并缓解语音转换带来的声学失配问题。

Method: 使用定制的数据增强策略提取保留特定属性的标记，并引入增强损失来对齐源语音与语音转换后语音的语义编码器输出，以鼓励生成与说话人无关的嵌入。

Result: 在 LibriSpeech test-clean 数据集上，AugCodec 在重构质量和属性解耦方面均显著优于现有最先进的方法，且仅在 12.5Hz 频率下使用三个标记流运行。

Conclusion: 结合数据增强和对齐损失的解耦策略能有效降低语音编解码器的码率，并在保证重构质量的同时实现高度的属性解耦。

Abstract: We propose AugCodec, a low-bitrate disentangled neural speech codec that leverages data augmentation to decompose speech into three distinct components: semantic, speaker, and prosody tokens. Specifically, we employ tailored augmenta tion strategies to transform speech into distinct variants, each serving as input for extracting tokens that preserve the target attribute while suppressing others. This disentanglement strategy enables substantial reduction in token rate. Further more, we introduce an augmentation loss that aligns semantic encoder outputs between source and voice-converted speech, encouraging speaker-agnostic embeddings while mitigating the acoustic mismatch induced by voice conversion. Experiments on LibriSpeech test-clean demonstrate that AugCodec significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both reconstruction quality and disentanglement, while operating at only 12.5Hz with three token streams.

</details>


### [24] [ISCSLP 2026 CoT-TTS Challenge: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Context-Aware Text-to-Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21933)
*Wei Xue,Junlan Feng,Shilei Zhang,Yue Wang,Ruosong Yang,Bei Liu,Liumeng Xue,Sitong Cheng,Jiahao Pan,Weizhen Bian,Boyi Kang,Bin Long*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文介绍了 ISCSLP 2026 CoT-TTS 挑战赛，旨在评估语音合成系统如何通过上下文推断说话方式，并结合思维链（CoT）推理生成富有表现力的语音。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可控 TTS 系统过度依赖用户显式提供的风格提示，难以在复杂的多轮对话场景中自动推断合适的说话风格。

Method: 挑战赛设置了文本和音频上下文感知两个赛道，提供大规模双语数据集，要求参赛系统输出推理过程与语音波形；同时提供了一个基于 0.6B Qwen3 的三阶段微调基线模型，并采用客观、多模态 LLM 及人工主观评估相结合的机制。

Result: 构建了完整的挑战赛平台和评测基准，发布了包含基准模型、微调方案和推理代码的开源资源。

Conclusion: 该挑战赛将有力推动上下文理解、思维链推理以及 expressive TTS 技术在有声书、影视配音和虚拟助手等领域的应用发展。

Abstract: Recent advances in text-to-speech (TTS) have greatly improved speech naturalness, speaker similarity, and controllability. However, most existing controllable TTS systems still rely on explicit user-provided style prompts, making it difficult to automatically determine how a sentence should be spoken in long and complex conversational scenarios. This proposal introduces the ISCSLP 2026 CoT-TTS Challenge, which aims to evaluate whether a system can infer the intended speaking manner from contextual information and generate speech consistent with both the reasoning output and the surrounding scene. The challenge contains two tracks: text-context-aware CoT-TTS and audio-context-aware CoT-TTS. We construct a large-scale bilingual training set from speech-rich media and provide carefully filtered evaluation data for leaderboard comparison. Each system is required to output both a chain-of-thought reasoning analysis and the generated speech waveform. The official evaluation combines objective metrics, multimodal LLM-based evaluation, and human subjective assessment. To facilitate reproducibility, we provide inference code together with a fine-tuning recipe for a 0.6B Qwen3-based model trained via a three-stage strategy. This challenge is expected to support research on context understanding, chain-of-thought reasoning, and expressive speech generation for applications such as film dubbing, audiobook production, virtual characters, and spoken dialogue agents. Further information about the associated challenge is available at:https://iscslp2026-cot-tts.github.io/challenge-website/

</details>


### [25] [InstructFX2FX: A Multi-turn Text-to-Preset Demo for Iterative Audio Effect Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22005)
*Song-Ze Yu,Milan Liessens Dujardin,Yuxuan Cai,Wantong Zhang*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: InstructFX2FX 是一个结合大语言模型与 CLAP 引导优化的系统，实现了多轮、文本引导的交互式音频效果连续微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有系统多为单次生成，而实际音频工程需要多轮迭代调整。直接重新提示LLM容易破坏未被要求修改的参数，缺乏状态保持能力。

Method: 采用混合架构：LLM作为高层规划器决定音效选择、信号链顺序及初始参数，再通过CLAP引导的优化进行感知层面的参数微调，以实现局部且精准的更新。

Result: 在SocialFX基准测试中，该方法在9/10的描述符转换上降低了DSP特征的最大均值差异（MMD），平均MMD降低了约24%（从0.45降至0.34）。

Conclusion: 结合大模型规划与感知特征优化的方法，能更高效、更具控制力地完成符合人类音效工程师习惯的多轮交互式音频调整。

Abstract: We present InstructFX2FX, an interactive demonstration of multi-turn, text-guided audio effect refinement. Existing text-to-preset systems are largely single-shot, mapping one textual descriptor to one preset. Real audio engineering is instead sequential: engineers refine an existing effect chain through successive instructions such as "make it warmer" or "too harsh, soften it." This poses a stateful problem that single-shot systems do not address: given the current effect parameters and a new instruction, update the sound while preserving what earlier instructions already achieved. InstructFX2FX tackles this with a hybrid architecture that divides labor between a language model and CLAP-guided optimization. The LLM acts as a high-level planner that selects effects, orders the signal chain, and proposes initial parameters, motivated by recent evidence that LLM initialization outperforms CLAP optimization from a random start; CLAP-guided optimization then refines those parameters perceptually, giving more controllable updates than re-prompting the LLM at each turn, which tends to perturb settings the user did not ask to change. At the demo, attendees drive a dry recording through successive natural-language instructions and inspect the evolving FX chain, intermediate optimization checkpoints, and session state. On SocialFX-derived descriptor transitions, CLAP-guided refinement lowers target-directed DSP-feature MMD on 9 of 10 directed descriptor pairs relative to an LLM-only reprompting baseline, reducing the average MMD by roughly 24% (0.45 to 0.34).

</details>


### [26] [Toward Open-Set Speaker Attribute Prediction with Keyword-Appended LLM Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21979)
*Byoungjun So,Jaejun Lee,Kyogu Lee*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）嵌入的开放集说话人属性预测框架，提升了语义丰富度与零样本泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的说话人属性预测依赖于固定的分类标签，缺乏语义丰富性和零样本泛化能力。

Method: 利用LLM嵌入在连续语义空间中表示属性，引入关键字附加策略以弥合跨模态差距，并采用top-k负样本损失建立鲁棒的决策边界。

Result: 在LibriTTS-P数据集上的表现优于闭集基线模型，并能有效泛化至未见过的同义词，同时优化了嵌入流形几何结构。

Conclusion: 该方法通过结合LLM语义嵌入与特定的流形正则化策略，成功实现了更具泛化性和准确性的开放集说话人属性预测。

Abstract: Understanding speaker attributes is crucial for voice-related applications, yet conventional approaches rely on fixed categorical labels, lacking semantic richness and zero-shot generalizability. We propose a novel framework for open-set speaker attribute prediction leveraging Large Language Model (LLM) embeddings to represent attributes in a continuous semantic space. To bridge the cross-modal gap, we introduce a keyword-appending strategy that structures broad semantic representations into a compact, discriminative manifold. Furthermore, we employ a top-k negative loss to establish robust decision boundaries in crowded semantic regions. Experimental results on LibriTTS-P demonstrate that our method outperforms closed-set benchmarks and generalizes effectively to unseen synonyms. Geometric analysis suggests that our strategies regularize the embedding manifold, balancing semantic cohesion with predictive clarity.

</details>


### [27] [An Analysis of Untrained Deep Reservoir Networks for Audio Surveillance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22218)
*Corrado Baccheschi,Patrizio Dazzi*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文研究了用于紧急声音事件检测的双向回声状态网络，评估了不同深度模型在性能与效率之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在探索无训练的循环水库计算模型在资源受限的音频监控场景下的可行性，平衡识别率、噪声鲁棒性与计算效率。

Method: 在MIVIA数据集上评估了不同深度的双向回声状态网络，与BiLSTM和CRNN基线进行对比，并在NVIDIA Orin等边缘设备上进行了效率测试。

Result: 水库模型取得了极具竞争力的准确率，其中深层模型在强噪声下更鲁棒，浅层模型效率极高，且对多种输入表征均表现出良好的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 无训练的水库计算架构是面向资源受限音频监控应用的一种极具前景的高效解决方案。

Abstract: In this paper, we investigate untrained recurrent models from the Reservoir Computing (RC) paradigm for audio surveillance, focusing on bidirectional Echo State Networks with different depths, from shallow to deep configurations, for emergency sound event detection. We evaluate these models on the MIVIA Audio Events dataset in a multiclass setting across different Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) levels, with the goal of assessing the trade-off between depth, recognition performance, and computational efficiency. We compare the proposed architectures against fully trained recurrent and convolutional-recurrent baselines, namely Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory networks (BiLSTMs) and Convolutional Recurrent Neural Networks (CRNNs). Results show that deep and shallow reservoir-based models achieve competitive recognition rates, with deeper variants being more robust in highly noisy conditions and shallower ones offering the most favorable efficiency profile, particularly on edge devices such as the NVIDIA Orin. In addition, the proposed approach remains robust across different input representations, including log-Mel spectrograms and MFCCs with varying resolutions. These findings highlight untrained reservoir architectures as a promising solution for resource-constrained audio surveillance scenarios.

</details>


### [28] [What Do Neural Networks Learn for TDOA Estimation? A Cross-Architecture Probing Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22020)
*Yaozhong Kang,Jiang Wang,Runwu Shi,Takeshi Ashizawa,Benjamin Yen,Kazuhiro Nakadai*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文探究了神经网络在双耳时间差（TDOA）估计中的内部机制，发现网络舍弃了传统GCC-PHAT的白化步骤，转而学习一种保留幅度信息的自适应频率加权策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管神经网络在TDOA估计上的表现优于经典的GCC-PHAT算法，但其内部的具体运行机制和决策策略仍未被揭示。

Method: 将GCC-PHAT的数学步骤转化为诊断目标，对MLP、CNN和Transformer三种架构的隐藏层进行探测，并结合梯度归因和因果频率掩蔽方法进行分析。

Result: 研究发现所有架构都自发学习了互功率谱计算，但并未学习PHAT白化。网络倾向于学习幅度感知的频率加权以保留频率可靠性信息。在噪声和混响环境下，移除或替换PHAT白化能够提升估计性能。

Conclusion: PHAT白化在TDOA估计中构成了信息瓶颈，神经网络通过学习数据自适应的频率加权实现了比传统GCC-PHAT更优的性能。

Abstract: Neural networks outperform classical GCC-PHAT for Time-Difference-of-Arrival (TDOA) estimation in noise and reverberation, yet their internal strategy remains unexplored. To uncover it, we turn GCC-PHAT's mathematical steps into diagnostic targets, probing hidden layers of three architectures (MLP, CNN, Transformer) and complementing with gradient attribution and causal frequency masking. We find that cross-power computation consistently emerges across all architectures and conditions, while PHAT whitening, the defining step of GCC-PHAT, fails to emerge. Instead, networks learn a magnitude-aware frequency weighting that preserves per-frequency reliability information discarded by PHAT. This makes PHAT an information bottleneck: removing it from both classical and neural GCC pipelines improves performance under additive noise. On real-world reverberant data, PHAT remains the best classical weighting, but end-to-end networks achieve lower error by learning data-adaptive weighting.

</details>


### [29] [Learning to Evade: Adaptive Attacks on Audio Watermarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22310)
*Weikang Ding,Hanqing Guo,Rui Duan,Guangjing Wang,Yuanda Wang,Mingzhe Chen,Qiben Yan*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 AWM 的自适应音频水印攻击方法，旨在绕过现有的防篡改检测机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频水印防御方法利用解码概率符合正态分布的特性来检测操纵行为，因此需要开发一种能规避此类检测的新型攻击方法。

Method: 采用两阶段优化方法，第一阶段确保攻击成功，第二阶段提升音频质量；通过估算正态分布参数，自适应地将解码概率引导回正常范围以逃避检测。

Result: 实验表明，AWM 在保持高攻击成功率的同时，将检测器的检测率降至极低（替换和创建低于 10%，移除为 0%）。

Conclusion: AWM 成功挑战了现有的音频水印防御机制，展示了自适应概率对齐攻击的有效性。

Abstract: Advances in generative audio have intensified copyright concerns, making audio watermarking increasingly important for asserting ownership. However, existing audio watermarking methods are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. We find that watermark decoder message probabilities follow normal distributions, a property exploited by defenses to detect manipulations. This paper introduces an adaptive audio watermark attack method (AWM) designed to bypass existing defense strategies. AWM uses a two-stage optimization: the first stage ensures attack success, while the second improves audio quality. To evade detection, it estimates normal distribution parameters from limited samples of the target audio, and then adaptively steers decoded probabilities back into the estimated range. Evaluated on two watermarking methods across three voice datasets, AWM achieves high success while bypassing state-of-the-art detectors: detection rates are below 10% for replacement and creation, and 0% for removal.

</details>


### [30] [Physics-Informed Neural Operator for Speech Production Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22364)
*Kazuya Yokota,Xinmeng Luan,Debasish Ray Mohapatra,Gary Scavone,Sidney Fels*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文首次提出了一种基于物理信息神经算子（PINO）的语音生成分析方法，实现了快速、无监督且可GPU并行的波动方程模拟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在克服传统数值模拟方法计算慢、需迭代的问题，利用PINO实现无需预计算监督数据的快速语音生成分析。

Method: 直接学习控制语音生成的一维波动方程，以声道形状数据为输入，预测基频（f0）、声门容积流速和唇部声压，并与传统龙格-库塔/有限差分法进行对比。

Result: 该模型在声门容积流速预测上的误差为0.8%，在语音波形上的误差为3.2%，实现了高效的GPU并行化非迭代模拟。

Conclusion: 物理信息神经算子（PINO）是实现快速语音分析的一种非常有前景的方法。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural operators (PINOs) have recently gained attention as fast numerical simulators with potential for solving inverse problems. This study proposes the first PINO-based method for speech production analysis. The model learns the governing one-dimensional wave equations directly without requiring pre-computed supervised training data. Using vocal tract shape data as input features, we compare the proposed model's predicted f0, glottal volume velocity and sound pressure at the lip for five static vowels to a conventional Runge Kutta/Finite difference approach. With errors of 0.8% for glottal volume flow and 3.2% for speech waveforms, the proposed model enables efficient GPU-parallelized simulation without iterative calculations. We conclude that PINO is a promising approach for fast analysis of speech.

</details>


### [31] [Kiwano: A Cutting-Edge Open-Source Toolkit for Speaker Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22369)
*Mickael Rouvier,Pierre Michel Bousquet*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Kiwano，一个旨在促进说话人确认研究与评估的开源工具包。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在降低说话人确认领域的准入门槛，标准化评估流程，并解决研究的可重复性问题。

Method: 基于PyTorch构建轻量且可扩展的框架，提供标准化配方、预训练模型、统一评估协议以及实验跟踪工具。

Result: 成功开发并开源了Kiwano工具包（采用Apache 2.0协议），提供了完整的文档和可重复的实验基准。

Conclusion: Kiwano为说话人确认领域的学术研究和应用开发提供了一个极具价值的标准化开源资源。

Abstract: In this paper, we present Kiwano, an open-source toolkit designed to advance research and evaluation for speaker verification. Kiwano provides a lightweight yet extensible framework built on PyTorch, offering standardized recipes, pretrained models, and integration of several widely used speaker verification architectures. The toolkit emphasizes reproducibility, by delivering transparent training pipelines, unified evaluation protocols and ready-to-use baselines across multiple corpora. Beyond conventional training and inference, Kiwano includes tools for benchmarking, experiment tracking and rapid prototyping of new architectures. To foster community adoption, the toolkit is distributed under the Apache 2.0 license, accompanied by comprehensive documentation and reproducible experiments. By lowering entry barriers and standardizing evaluation practices, Kiwano contributes a valuable resource for both academic research and applied development in speaker verification. The toolkit is publicly available at: https://github.com/kiwano-toolkit/kiwano/

</details>


### [32] [ATCCaps: A Call-Sign-Aware Speech Dataset for Air Traffic Control Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22399)
*Dongdong Li,Jianwei Song,Jianwei Wang,Zhe Wang*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文推出了ATCCaps，一个包含202.94小时音频的呼号感知空中交通管制（ATC）语音数据集，提供字幕级的音视频监督。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 呼号在空中交通管制通信中对安全至关重要，但目前缺乏具有字幕级音视频监督且关注呼号的ATC语音数据集。

Method: 通过结合置信度感知文本解析、ADS-B呼号元数据、呼号归一化、基于规则的过滤以及大语言模型（LLM）辅助的字幕生成来构建数据集，并基于ASR和CLAP建立了基线系统。

Result: 成功构建了包含170,385条话语和922个唯一呼号的ATCCaps数据集，实验证明该数据集能为呼号感知的ATC语音建模提供有效的监督，并建立了可用的ASR和检索基线。

Conclusion: ATCCaps为呼号感知的ATC语音建模提供了可扩展的数据支持，同时也指出未来需要更加关注字幕中呼号和数字的准确性验证。

Abstract: Call signs are safety-critical entities in air traffic control (ATC) communications because they identify the target aircraft of each spoken instruction. This paper presents ATCCaps, a call-sign-aware ATC speech dataset with caption-level audio-text supervision. Built from real ATC radiotelephony recordings, ATCCaps contains 202.94 hours of curated audio, 170,385 utterances, and 922 unique normalized call signs. The construction pipeline combines confidence-aware transcript parsing, ADS-B-derived call-sign metadata, call-sign normalization, rule-based quality filtering, and LLM-assisted caption generation. Each retained sample is paired with transcript descriptions, call-sign descriptions, and ATC-style captions, supporting ASR evaluation, call-sign matching, and call-sign-aware audio-text retrieval. We further characterize ATCCaps through split statistics, call-sign coverage, seen/unseen call-sign analysis, filtering audits, and caption quality evaluation. The evaluation subset is derived from the human-annotated ATCO2-test-set, enabling reference evaluation with manual transcripts. Results show that ATCCaps provides scalable audio-grounded call-sign supervision, while caption analysis highlights the need to explicitly validate call-sign and numeric fidelity. Reference ASR and CLAP-based baselines demonstrate the usability of ATCCaps for call-sign-aware ATC speech modeling.

</details>


### [33] [Scaling Audio Models Efficiently: A Joint Study of Compute Constraints and Optimization Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22790)
*Vyom Agarwal,Mokshda Gangrade,Siddharth Pal,Jerry Wu*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文研究了语音识别（ASR）和语音情感识别（SER）中计算分配与模型性能的折中关系，提出了一个统一的分析框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在探索在固定计算预算下，如何最优地在模型大小、输入长度和表示分辨率之间分配计算资源，以设计更高效的语音模型。

Method: 通过在 LibriSpeech 和 CREMA-D 数据集上系统地改变模型大小 ($x_N$)、输入长度 ($x_T$) 和表示分辨率 ($x_V$) 进行实验，并评估了 LoRA 微调的效果。

Result: 发现模型缩放存在边际效应递减；SER 任务中存在约 4 秒的最佳音频长度；降低 Token 分辨率可减半 GFLOPS 计算量而 WER 性能损失低于 3%。

Conclusion: 揭示了语音模型的非线性缩放行为，为优化分配模型容量、时间上下文和表征粒度提供了实用的设计指南。

Abstract: In this paper, we investigate the tradeoffs between compute allocation and model performance for two speech processing tasks: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) and Speech Emotion Recognition (SER). We propose a unified framework that analyzes three fundamental compute dimensions: model size ($x_N$), input length ($x_T$), and representation resolution ($x_V$). Motivated by recent advances in compute optimal scaling for multimodal models, we systematically vary these dimensions to examine their influence on task performance under fixed computational budgets. Our study provides insights into how compute resources can be optimally distributed across model capacity, temporal context, and representational granularity, offering practical guidelines for the design of efficient speech models. Through experiments on LibriSpeech and CREMA-D datasets, we demonstrate non-linear scaling behavior and identify optimal operating points. Our results show that (1) increasing model size yields diminishing returns: scaling Tiny (39M) to Small (244M) reduces WER by 8.22%, whereas Small to Medium (769M) reduces WER by only 2.35%; (2) an optimal audio duration of approximately 4 seconds exists for SER; and (3) reducing encoder token resolution provides an effective mechanism for lowering inference cost, Large-v3 (1540M) with 750 frames requires 2572 GFLOPS whereas with 1500 frames requires 5228 GFLOPS, with less than 3% relative increase in WER. Additionally, LoRA-based adaptation enables efficient finetuning with minimal performance degradation.

</details>


### [34] [Libretto: Giving LLM Agents a Sense of Musical Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22708)
*Yichen Xu*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: Libretto是一个面向智能体的符号音乐生成与修改框架，将音乐从原始Token序列转化为可测量和可编辑的结构化对象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的生成式音乐系统难以对输出音频的音乐结构进行检查、编辑和诊断。

Method: 采用LLM原生语法（包含显式起始槽、声部和节拍级组织），并在节奏、和声、旋律等维度构建语料库校准的统计评估空间，以支持检索、诊断、防抄袭控制和迭代自修。

Result: 在填空、参考引导的完整乐曲生成、渐变过渡以及教学音乐生成等任务中，实现了对符号音乐的精确控制与编辑。

Conclusion: Libretto成功将符号音乐转化为语言模型智能体可测量和可编辑的结构化对象，提升了生成音乐的可控性与诊断能力。

Abstract: Generative music systems can now produce impressive audio from text prompts, but audio outputs are difficult to inspect, edit, and diagnose as musical structure. We introduce Libretto, an agent-facing framework for symbolic music generation and revision. Libretto uses an LLM-native grammar with explicit onset slots, voices, and bar-level organization, then evaluates each piece in a corpus-calibrated statistical space over rhythm, harmony, melody, texture, form, and variation. The same structural axes support retrieval, diagnosis, copy-risk control, and iterative self-revision. Across gap filling, reference-guided full-piece generation, gradual morphing, and educational music generation, Libretto turns symbolic music from a raw token sequence into a measurable and editable object for language-model agents.

</details>


### [35] [Cross-lingual Retrieval-Augmented Classification for Dysarthria Severity Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22910)
*Taeyoung Jeong,Insung Lee,Du-Seong Chang,Myoung-Wan Koo*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出跨语言检索增强分类方法（CRAC），通过利用其他语言的语音数据提升构音障碍严重程度的评估效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 有标注的病理性语音数据稀缺限制了自动构音障碍严重程度评估的发展。

Method: 提出CRAC框架，采用“对齐-检索-融合”流水线。使用监督对比学习构建聚焦严重程度的嵌入空间，建立跨语言向量数据库，并通过交叉注意力融合检索到的Top-k参考样本。

Result: 在韩语和意大利语构音障碍数据集上，CRAC分别实现了87.3%和86.7%的平衡准确率，较单语言基线分别提升了8.4和20.0个百分点。

Conclusion: 跨语言检索增强方法能有效利用其他语言的数据，显著提升构音障碍评估性能，缓解数据稀缺问题。

Abstract: Automatic dysarthria severity assessment is limited by the scarcity of labeled pathological speech data. To address this, we propose Cross-lingual Retrieval-Augmented Classification (CRAC), which leverages speech from a different language via an align-retrieve-fuse pipeline. Supervised contrastive learning first shapes a severity-focused embedding space, then a vector database is built from the opposite-language corpus. During both training and inference, the classifier retrieves top-k references from the aligned space and fuses them with the input via cross-attention. Evaluated on Korean post-stroke and Italian ALS dysarthria datasets under a speaker-independent three-class protocol, CRAC achieves balanced accuracies of 87.3% on Korean and 86.7% on Italian, improving over monolingual baselines by 8.4 and 20.0 percentage points, respectively.

</details>


### [36] [HALAS: A Human-Annotated Dataset of Hallucinations of Modern ASR Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23048)
*Mateusz Barański,Jan Jasiński,Julitta Bartolewska,Marcin Witkowski,Konrad Kowalczyk*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文引入了首个针对真实语音识别（ASR）系统幻觉的人工标注数据集HALAS，为ASR幻觉检测提供了首个真实的评估基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的ASR幻觉缓解和评估方法大多依赖非语音或人工合成的损坏音频，缺乏对自然语音中真实幻觉的有效基准。

Method: 引入了首个由人类标注的自然ASR幻觉数据集HALAS（基于7个SOTA ASR模型在真实财报电话会议上的转写），提供跨度级标注，并以此构建了检测和缓解幻觉的评估基准。

Result: 发现不同模型的幻觉词汇有很强重合性，且幻觉常出现在低字错率的近乎正确转写中；基准测试表明，常用代理指标的ROC-AUC可达81%，但最先进的检测方法的F1分数仅为53.1%。

Conclusion: HALAS建立了首个针对ASR幻觉检测和缓解的非人工合成基准，指出了当前检测技术的局限性并为后续研究提供了方向。

Abstract: End-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems hallucinate on natural speech, yet existing mitigation methods are typically evaluated on non-speech or artificially corrupted audio. We introduce HALAS, the first human-annotated dataset of naturally occurring hallucinations from seven state-of-the-art ASR models on real unprocessed earnings call recordings. HALAS provides span-level labels, enabling analysis of hallucination patterns and their severity. Our analysis reveals strong cross-model vocabulary overlap and confirms that hallucinations also occur for almost correctly transcribed speech (characterized by a low Word Error Rate). The proposed benchmark with HALAS shows that the character and semantic-level metrics used as a proxy for hallucination detection reach 81% ROC-AUC, while state-of-the-art detection methods achieve an F1 score of only 53.1%. As such, HALAS establishes the first rigorous non-artificial benchmark for the detection and mitigation of ASR hallucinations.

</details>


### [37] [From Text Metrics to Model Internals: A Study of Whisper ASR Hallucination Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23060)
*Jan Jasiński,Mateusz Barański,Julitta Bartolewska,Marcin Witkowski,Konrad Kowalczyk*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 评估了三种检测Whisper语音识别模型幻觉的方法，发现探测解码器内部状态并与文本特征进行晚融合的效果最好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音识别模型产生的幻觉（与音频无关但流畅的转录）降低了系统性能，而如何鲁棒地检测这些幻觉错误仍是一个挑战。

Method: 在人工标注的数据集上，对比了基于文本、基于LLM和基于解码器内部状态探测的三种Whisper大模型幻觉检测方法，并构建了融合文本与内部状态的晚融合元分类器。

Result: 探测解码器内部状态在无需参考文本的情况下表现最优；LLM检测竞争力稍逊；而结合文本与内部状态的晚融合元分类器达到了最佳检测效果。

Conclusion: Whisper的幻觉特征被编码在其中间解码层中，通过晚融合结合文本和内部状态输出可以实现最优的幻觉检测性能。

Abstract: Hallucinations of ASR models - fluent transcriptions with no basis in audio - degrade system performance and pose risks in downstream applications. Robust detection of such errors remains a challenge. This paper studies Whisper large v3 hallucination detection on real-speech human-annotated data across three paradigms: text-based, LLM-based, and internal decoder state probing. Text classifiers utilizing metrics for text evaluation achieve high recall but degrade without reference transcripts. LLM-based detection improves precision with domain-specific prompt conditioning, yet remains less competitive than the lightweight text-based methods. Probing Whisper's decoder representations, without a ground-truth reference, yields the strongest performance, revealing that hallucination traits are encoded across intermediate decoding layers. A late-fusion meta-classifier combining text and internal-state outputs achieves the best overall detection performance.

</details>


### [38] [Synthesizing the Lombard Effect: Multi-Level Control of Speech Clarity and Vocal Effort in TTS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23176)
*Seymanur Akti,Alexander Waibel*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出一种基于流匹配的TTS模型，通过发声努力度和清晰度控制，成功在合成语音中模拟了人类的朗巴德效应，提升了噪声环境下的可懂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在解决语音合成系统在嘈杂环境或面向听障听众时，无法像人类那样自适应调整说话音量和清晰度（即朗巴德效应）的问题。

Method: 引入一种基于流匹配的TTS模型，并使用发声努力度和发音清晰度的伪标签进行训练，以实现对这两个特征的连续、解耦控制及词级强调。

Result: 实验结果显示该控制机制有效改善了清晰度相关的声学特征，且在噪声环境下的测试中成功模拟了人类清晰语音的可懂度增益。

Conclusion: 该方法实现了对语音发声努力度和清晰度的精细控制，有效提升了合成语音在具挑战性环境下的可懂度。

Abstract: Humans tend to speak louder and clearer in challenging environments, such as noisy conditions or when addressing hearingimpaired listeners, which is called Lombard effect. To simulate this behavior in speech synthesis systems, we introduce a flow-matching based text-to-speech (TTS) model trained with vocal effort and articulation pseudo-labels. The proposed model achieves continuous and disentangled control of vocal effort and articulation, while also enabling word-level emphasis for clarifying specific segments of an utterance. Experimental results show that these control mechanisms effectively improve clarityrelated acoustic features. Furthermore, speech-in-noise experiments demonstrate that our model successfully simulates the intelligibility gains of human clear speech in noisy conditions.

</details>


### [39] [The Watermark Shortcut: How Provenance Marking Sabotages Audio Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23335)
*Nicolas M. Müller,Pascal Debus*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 研究揭示了合成语音水印技术会导致检测器产生“有水印即为假”的错误关联捷径，从而引发安全漏洞，并提出了修复方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨当合成语音带有水印而真实语音没有时，检测器是否会错误地将水印特征作为判断“伪造语音”的捷径，从而导致安全漏洞。

Method: 通过白盒对照实验和商业API黑盒测试，评估检测器的三种失效表现，并通过在真实与合成语音上同时添加水印进行重训来消除该捷径，同时发布了对比数据集WASP。

Result: 检测器出现了泛化能力下降、去水印逃逸及加水印栽赃（将真实语音判定为假，使等错误率从16%升至75%）三种失效；而通过双类别去相关重训成功修复了该漏洞。

Conclusion: “水印即伪造”的检测捷径是一个严重的安全隐患，但通过在训练中将水印特征与语音真伪进行去相关性处理可以有效解决该问题。

Abstract: Provenance watermarking is increasingly treated as a safeguard for synthetic speech, whether built directly into speech-generation models such as Chatterbox, provided through dedicated techniques such as AudioSeal, or deployed by commercial platforms such as ElevenLabs. We identify a previously uncharacterized liability: when synthetic speech is watermarked and human speech is not, detectors trained alongside latch onto the watermark as a spurious "watermark => fake" shortcut. This single feature yields three coupled failures: generalization degradation (model performance deteriorates on unseen data), strip-to-evade (a watermarked fake escapes once unwatermarked), and mark-to-frame (watermarking a real voice flags it as fake). In a controlled white-box experiment, a watermark-trained detector shows all three (for example, mark-to-frame lifts Equal Error Rate from 16% to 75%). In a black-box test of a commercial API, we show that adding a watermark to real speech disguises it as fake. However, this shortcut is fixable: retraining with the watermark on both classes decorrelates it and restores clean behavior. We release experiment data as a paired clean-versus-watermarked corpus (WASP).

</details>


### [40] [Towards Reliable Audio Deepfake Attribution and Model Recognition: A Multi-Level Autoencoder-Based Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.02521)
*Andrea Di Pierno,Luca Guarnera,Dario Allegra,Sebastiano Battiato*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 本文提出了LAVA框架，这是一种用于音频深度伪造检测和生成模型归属的分层架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 音频深度伪造威胁到数字通信的信任，而识别伪造音频的具体生成源模型是一项关键但尚未得到充分研究的挑战。

Method: 利用仅在伪造音频上训练的卷积自编码器提取注意力增强的潜表征，并构建了两个专用分类器：音频深度伪造归属（ADA）和音频深度伪造模型识别（ADMR），同时结合置信度拒绝阈值以提高开放集环境下的鲁棒性。

Result: 在多个公开数据集上表现优异，ADA分类器F1分数超过95%，ADMR模块达到96.31%的宏F1分数，并且在未见过的攻击测试中表现出强鲁棒性。

Conclusion: LAVA框架通过监督学习方法有效推进了开放集条件下的深度伪造归属和模型识别技术，具有高鲁棒性和可靠性。

Abstract: The proliferation of audio deepfakes poses a growing threat to trust in digital communications. While detection methods have advanced, attributing audio deepfakes to their source models remains an underexplored yet crucial challenge. In this paper we introduce LAVA (Layered Architecture for Voice Attribution), a hierarchical framework for audio deepfake detection and model recognition that leverages attention-enhanced latent representations extracted by a convolutional autoencoder trained solely on fake audio. Two specialized classifiers operate on these features: Audio Deepfake Attribution (ADA), which identifies the generation technology, and Audio Deepfake Model Recognition (ADMR), which recognize the specific generative model instance. To improve robustness under open-set conditions, we incorporate confidence-based rejection thresholds. Experiments on ASVspoof2021, FakeOrReal, and CodecFake show strong performance: the ADA classifier achieves F1-scores over 95% across all datasets, and the ADMR module reaches 96.31% macro F1 across six classes. Additional tests on unseen attacks from ASVpoof2019 LA and error propagation analysis confirm LAVA's robustness and reliability. The framework advances the field by introducing a supervised approach to deepfake attribution and model recognition under open-set conditions, validated on public benchmarks and accompanied by publicly released models and code. Models and code are available at https://www.github.com/adipiz99/lava-framework.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [41] [On the Identifiability of User Adaptation in Co-Adaptive Neural Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20569)
*Philip Waggoner*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 共同适应人机系统中的编码器估计无法唯一识别用户适应性，而是反映了联合系统的整体属性，需特定条件才能准确识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在解决人机共适系统中，如何准确识别和区分用户适应行为与机器适应行为的问题。

Method: 对闭环共适人机系统中的可识别性进行理论分析，并推导实现唯一识别的必要条件。

Result: 发现闭环编码器估计无法唯一确定用户的适应性，而是反映了人机联合系统的特征。

Conclusion: 解释行为适应性时需谨慎，必须满足特定的可识别性条件才能准确评估用户的适应过程。

Abstract: We analyze identifiability in co-adaptive human-machine systems. We show that closed-loop encoder estimates do not uniquely identify user adaptation, but instead reflect properties of the joint system. We discuss implications for interpreting behavioral adaptation and propose conditions for identification.

</details>


### [42] [The New Associationism: Lessons from Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20600)
*Daniel Rothschild*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 现代AI的成功支持了一种温和的联结主义（associationism）学习理论，表明人类学习也可能依赖于类似的误差驱动和反馈机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索现代人工智能（AI）的成功对理解人类学习机制的启示，特别是重新评估联结主义在解释人类高阶认知能力中的可行性。

Method: 通过理论分析，探讨监督学习（由评估性反馈驱动的学习）在大型语言模型和游戏AI等现代AI系统中的核心作用，并将其与传统联结主义进行比较。

Result: 发现监督学习作为一种统一的、渐进的、误差驱动的机制，在多种AI系统中发挥了核心作用，这反驳了“联结主义机制过于局限而无法解释人类认知”的传统观点；同时指出，深度学习的成功还依赖于远超传统联结主义的计算架构。

Conclusion: 将AI作为人类学习的建模工具，支持了一种温和且真实的联结主义观点，但强调监督学习只是复杂架构中的一个组件，而非学习的全部解释。

Abstract: What can the success of modern AI tell us about how humans learn? This paper argues that taking AI seriously as a model of human learning supports a modest but genuine associationism. The central finding is that supervised learning -- learning driven by evaluative feedback -- underlies a surprisingly wide range of contemporary AI systems, from large language models to game-playing agents, differing primarily in how much work is required to generate the relevant feedback signal. This vindicates associationist ideals of a uniform, gradual, error-driven learning mechanism operating across domains, and defuses the once-influential argument that associationist mechanisms are too limited to account for human cognitive capacities. At the same time, the successes of deep learning depend on computational architectures that go well beyond anything classical associationists envisaged, and supervised learning operates within these as one component rather than a complete account of learning.

</details>


### [43] [Specifying AI-SDLC Processes: A Protocol Language for Human-Agent Boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20615)
*Ylli Prifti*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于规范AI软件开发生命周期（AI-SDLC）中人机协作边界与治理约束的领域特定语言（DSL）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如提示词或传统工作流）无法有效定义和约束AI-SDLC中复杂的人机协作责任边界与审批流程。

Method: 设计了一种具备形式化语法、操作语义和执行不变性的DSL，通过验证令牌和能力边界将策略与执行机制分离。

Result: 通过结构化执行降低了系统故障率，形式化了2+N团队模式（职责分离），并实现了编排循环的Kleene闭包等设计属性，同时完成了原型实现。

Conclusion: 该语言成功整合了多智能体框架与能力安全机制，有效限制了AI-SDLC流程的非确定性，证实了方案的可行性。

Abstract: AI agents now participate as first-class team members across the software development lifecycle, yet no specification language exists for expressing the human-agent responsibility boundaries, approval gates, and governance constraints this collaboration requires. Existing approaches encode process in agent prompts (subject to drift), target adjacent domains (workflow management, business processes), or address only fragments (access control, approval gates).
  We propose a domain-specific language for specifying AI-SDLC processes as protocols, with formal syntax, well-formedness conditions, operational semantics, and enforcement invariants. The language distinguishes policy (declared intent) from mechanism (structural enforcement), enabling implementations to bound process non-determinism through primitives such as validation tokens and capability boundaries.
  Three results follow. A failure rate analysis shows that structural enforcement bounds system failure rates at a weighted product of agent and validator rates, while behavioral compliance permits cumulative or near-saturating growth. The 2+N team pattern (two human-in-control roles plus N specialized agent members) formalizes classical Separation of Duties for AI-SDLC. Kleene closure of orchestration loops and reflexive protocol-adherence validation emerge as design properties rather than special-case constructs.
  We position the contribution against multi-agent frameworks (MetaGPT), workflow specification (FlowAgent, BPMN extensions), and capability-based security (SAGA): the novelty lies in the specific integration, not any single primitive. A working implementation demonstrates feasibility; empirical evaluation is future work.

</details>


### [44] [PEAR: Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20621)
*Yang Feng,Ziwei Xu,Xia Hu,Fengxiang He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PEAR通过动态且置换等变地重构多智能体辩论中的角色与通信拓扑，显著提升了大语言模型的推理能力和可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体辩论中固定的拓扑结构会导致持久的位置偏见、放大不可靠智能体的影响，且对角色分配高度敏感。

Method: 提出PEAR协议，在推理过程中根据智能体状态动态调整角色和稀疏通信拓扑，在理论上将其构建为置换等变稀疏路由器以降低复杂度并提高泛化性。

Result: 在4个推理基准和6个LLM骨干模型上的实验表明，PEAR相比现有的强辩论基线方法显著提高了平均准确率。

Conclusion: 动态路由和置换等变设计能有效消除特权网络位置偏见，使影响力分配更均匀，从而提升多智能体协同推理的性能。

Abstract: Multi-agent debate improves the reliability of large language models (LLMs) through iterative peer critiques. However, fixed topologies often introduce persistent positional biases, amplify unreliable agents, and cause high sensitivity to role assignments. We introduce \textit{Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate (PEAR)}, an inference-time protocol that dynamically reconfigures communication roles and sparse topologies across consecutive debate rounds. By strategically switching agent-to-role assignments based on evolving agent states, PEAR prevents any agent from permanently occupying a privileged network position or distributes influence more evenly across the debate. We theoretically characterize PEAR as an equivariant sparse router: it preserves accuracy under agent relabeling while reducing routing complexity and improving generalization. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across four reasoning benchmarks and six diverse LLM backbones demonstrate PEAR significantly improves average accuracy over the strongest debate baselines. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/PEAR.

</details>


### [45] [Beyond Fixed Budgets: Characterizing the Inelasticity and Limitations of Tree-of-Thought Reasoning Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20599)
*Atkia Mahila,Avinash Maurya,M. Mustafa Rafique,Bogdan Nicolae*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了两种代表性思维树（ToT）搜索策略（DPTS和SSDP）在不同计算预算、模型规模和问题难度下的表现与局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索不同的思维树搜索策略在不同计算预算、模型大小和问题难度下的实际表现和行为特征。

Method: 在两个数学推理基准（Math500和GSM8K）上，评估了基于MCTS的DPTS方法和基于语义去重的SSDP方法在不同模型规模及Token预算下的表现。

Result: DPTS在低预算下因冷启动导致效率较低，但在高预算下扩展性较好；SSDP在低预算下效率高，但因过度剪枝导致在高预算下无法进一步提升性能。

Conclusion: 单一的固定探索或剪枝策略无法适应不同的计算预算，高效的推理检索需要能够根据资源和进度动态调整的自适应策略。

Abstract: Tree of Thought (ToT) search has become a promising direction for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models, but deploying these methods in practice raises a question that has received little systematic attention: how do different search strategies behave under varying compute budgets, model sizes, and problem difficulties? In this work, we evaluate two representative ToT methods; DPTS, a Monte Carlo tree search based approach, and SSDP, a semantic deduplication based approach, across two mathematical reasoning benchmarks (Math500 and GSM8K), two model scales (Llama-3B and Llama-8B), and four token budgets (3k--10k). Our analysis reveals that the two methods exhibit limitations that pull in opposite directions. DPTS suffers from a cold-start bottleneck at low budgets: it requires sufficient exploration before its value estimates become reliable, making it a poor fit for resource-constrained settings despite strong scaling behavior at higher budgets. SSDP, on the other hand, reaches candidate solutions efficiently but is prone to frontier depletion; its aggressive node merging permanently discards unexplored paths, leaving it unable to improve regardless of how much budget remains. Together, these findings suggest that neither a fixed exploration strategy nor a fixed pruning strategy is sufficient across compute continuum. We argue that effective search for scientific reasoning agents requires strategies that can adapt their behavior based on search progress and available resources.

</details>


### [46] [Darwin Mobile Agent: A Roadmap for Self-Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20622)
*Daniel Beechey,Derek Yuen,Jianheng Liu,Dezhao Luo,Tiantian He,Weilin Luo,Jun Wang,Kun Shao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了 Darwin 移动智能体，一个旨在通过消除人类先验并在并行云手机环境中进行自主强化学习的开源基础设施。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了构建具备通用和自适应能力的智能体，需要减少人类先验，让智能体在比自身更复杂的“大世界”（如移动 GUI）中通过自主交互涌现出智能。

Method: 开发了 Darwin 移动智能体基础设施，利用并行的云手机实例建立异步智能体-环境循环，并提出了在任务课程、结果验证和记忆管理中系统性移除人类先验的路线图。

Result: 验证了 Darwin 基础设施在策略优化（路线图第一阶段）中的稳定性和可扩展性，解决了真实移动交互中的数据收集瓶颈。

Conclusion: 该工作为开发真正自主、自我进化的 GUI 智能体奠定了实践与理论基础。

Abstract: The goal of artificial intelligence is to create agents capable of general, adaptive behaviour in open-ended environments. Guided by the "Bitter Lesson", we argue that the most effective path toward this goal is to systematically remove human priors and allow intelligence to naturally emerge through interaction with a "Big World" that is orders of magnitude more complex than the agent itself.
